WellnessCheckIn.title: WellnessCheckIn
WellnessCheckIn.description: Daily wellness report submitted by a student regarding their mood and sleep quality.

id.description: Unique identifier of the check-in doc.

studentId.description: The UID of the student submitting the check-in.

studentName.description: The display name of the student.

moodLabel.description: Textual label of the mood, e.g., Relaxed, Stressed, Energized, Tired, Focused.

sleepHours.description: Hours of sleep reported for the previous night.

sleepQuality.description: Quality of sleep, e.g., Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent.

notes.description: Optional notes or personal feeling diary.

attentionSnapshot.description: Snapshot of the attention level during check-in, e.g., Low, Moderate, High.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of when the check-in occurred.

DistressSignal.title: DistressSignal
DistressSignal.description: Simulated emergency distress signal manually triggered by the student.

id.description: Unique identifier of the distress signal.

studentId.description: The UID of the student triggering the signal.

message.description: Distress message or alert status detail.

attentionSnapshot.description: EEG Attention attentionSnapshot state at trigger time.

stressSnapshot.description: EEG stressSnapshot state at trigger time.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when distress alert was triggered.

/wellness_check_ins/{checkInId}.description: Collection of student daily wellness self-reports.

/distress_signals/{signalId}.description: Collection of emergency distress alerts filed by students for parent and teacher reviews.
